curation_notes: The patch modifies 4 non-test source files (connection.rs, stream.rs, flow_control.rs, error.rs). The core vulnerability is in flow_control.rs where increase_send_window_by uses checked_add().expect() which panics on u32 overflow. The patch converts panic-on-overflow to Result-based error handling with a new InvalidWindowUpdate error variant. Locations derived from the patch diff: the primary vulnerable function is increase_send_window_by in flow_control.rs, and the caller on_window_update in connection.rs which did not handle the overflow error.
